Class FinalController

java.lang.Object
com.example.escriturarapida.controller.result.FinalController
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFinalController
public class FinalController extends Object implements IFinalController
Controller for the final results screen.

Displays the game outcome including levels completed, end reason, remaining time, and win/loss status. Provides options to restart the game or return to the welcome screen. Implements IFinalController to define the required navigation actions.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Cristian Camilo Criollo Diaz

  • Constructor Details

    • FinalController

      public FinalController()

  • Method Details

    • setData

      public void setData(int niveles, String motivo, int tiempoRestante, boolean win_lose)
      Populates the final screen with the game result data.

      Sets the level count, end reason, and remaining time labels. Colors the reason label green for a win or red for a loss. Also requests focus on the root node so keyboard events can be received.

      Parameters:
      niveles - the total number of levels completed
      motivo - the reason the game ended
      tiempoRestante - the remaining time in seconds at game end
      win_lose - true if the player won, false if lost

    • onHandleRestart

      public void onHandleRestart(javafx.event.ActionEvent event) throws IOException
      Handles the restart button action.

      Loads the game view and resets the game from the beginning.

      Specified by:
      onHandleRestart in interface IFinalController
      Parameters:
      event - the action event triggered by the restart button
      Throws:
      IOException - if the game view FXML cannot be loaded

    • goToWelcome

      private void goToWelcome() throws IOException
      Navigates back to the welcome screen.

      Shared navigation logic used by both the exit button and the Escape key handler.

      Throws:
      IOException - if the welcome view FXML cannot be loaded

    • onHandleExit

      public void onHandleExit(javafx.event.ActionEvent event) throws IOException
      Handles the exit button action.

      Delegates navigation to goToWelcome().

      Specified by:
      onHandleExit in interface IFinalController
      Parameters:
      event - the action event triggered by the exit button
      Throws:
      IOException - if the welcome view FXML cannot be loaded

    • onHandleKeyPressed

      public void onHandleKeyPressed(javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent event) throws IOException
      Handles key press events on the final screen.

      If the Escape key is pressed, navigates back to the welcome screen.

      Parameters:
      event - the key event triggered by the player's keyboard input
      Throws:
      IOException - if the welcome view FXML cannot be loaded
